item.title: [ Mod ] FIRE L4D1 SCRIPTS+PARTICLES
item.description:
View Article

1 / 8
FUEGO DE LEFT 1 ORIGINAL Y DAÑO PARA L4D2 AL ESTILO L4D1 TODAVIA FALTA POR TERMINAR ESTE TRABAJO PACIENCIA SE IRA ACTUALIZANDO Y DANDO INFORMES EN LA DESCRIPCIÓN

item.title: [ Mod ] Campaign Posters
item.description:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 8
This is an addon you run in L4D2 addons so any custom campaign switcher plugin on a L4D2 SRCDS will show the loading poster of the next custom campaign. Permission received from Sherriff Huckleberry in the Steam workshop. All posters created by the author of said custom campaign and extracted from those custom campaigns.
item.content:encoded:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 8
This is an addon you run in L4D2 addons so any custom campaign switcher plugin on a L4D2 SRCDS will show the loading poster of the next custom campaign. Permission received from Sherriff Huckleberry in the Steam workshop. All posters created by the author of said custom campaign and extracted from those custom campaigns.

item.title: [ Mod ] Concept Art Style Hunter
item.description:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 3
"Alright here the Concept Art Style of Hunter, I made this idea for the mod. This was based on the L4D2 Hunter Concept Art, it took it from the Left 4 Dead Wiki for some reason, I tried to make more details and accurate over l4d2 hunter like the concept art, and trying to make look like this... Couldn't figure it out, Until I finished it. I have to the L4D2 Concept Art of Hunter was different than the Final Version, BTW you can look over on Hunter Gallery Archive on Left 4 Dead Wiki until you see about, I hope you enjoy that mod I made... Have Fun!" -SplatterW2007 Steam Workshop Version: https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3743899618 GameBanana Version: https://gamebanana.com/mods/685684
item.content:encoded:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 3
"Alright here the Concept Art Style of Hunter, I made this idea for the mod. This was based on the L4D2 Hunter Concept Art, it took it from the Left 4 Dead Wiki for some reason, I tried to make more details and accurate over l4d2 hunter like the concept art, and trying to make look like this... Couldn't figure it out, Until I finished it. I have to the L4D2 Concept Art of Hunter was different than the Final Version, BTW you can look over on Hunter Gallery Archive on Left 4 Dead Wiki until you see about, I hope you enjoy that mod I made... Have Fun!" -SplatterW2007 Steam Workshop Version: https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3743899618 GameBanana Version: https://gamebanana.com/mods/685684

item.title: [ 6 Maps ] Dead City 2
item.description:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 7
Kill plenty of zombies starting in RiverSide (city) Battle through the Back Alleys, over a Draw Bridge, at a Military Outpost Find yourself at a Water Plant and escape at the Subway Station
